selected_for_build.name: Resume Optimizer AI
selected_for_build.tagline: Fix your resume in 60 seconds — land more interviews
selected_for_build.icp: job seekers who have been applying for weeks with no callbacks
selected_for_build.pain_point: Candidates spend hours perfecting resumes and still hear nothing — ATS systems reject them silently
selected_for_build.core_feature: Paste your resume → AI identifies ATS issues, weak action verbs, missing keywords, formatting problems → outputs a bullet-by-bullet rewrite
selected_for_build.founder_story: I applied to 80 jobs and heard nothing. A recruiter told me my resume was getting rejected by ATS before a human ever saw it. Fixed 3 things and got 4 interviews the next week.

selected_for_build.name: Invoice Generator Pro
selected_for_build.tagline: Professional invoices in 30 seconds — get paid faster
selected_for_build.icp: freelancers and consultants who delay invoicing because it takes too long
selected_for_build.pain_point: Freelancers lose money to late payments because creating professional invoices is time-consuming and awkward
selected_for_build.core_feature: Enter client name, services, amounts → AI generates a professional PDF-ready invoice with your branding, payment terms, and late fee clause
selected_for_build.founder_story: I used to delay sending invoices because Word templates were a nightmare. Lost $2k one month because I forgot to invoice. Built this so I can invoice in 30 seconds from my phone.

selected_for_build.name: Meeting Notes AI
selected_for_build.tagline: Paste meeting transcript → action items, decisions, summary
selected_for_build.icp: remote workers and managers who attend 5+ meetings per day
selected_for_build.pain_point: People spend hours after meetings writing notes, lose track of action items, and forget what was decided
selected_for_build.core_feature: Paste raw meeting transcript or notes → AI extracts: executive summary, decisions made, action items with owners, follow-up questions, and a Slack-ready update
selected_for_build.founder_story: I had 8 meetings on a Tuesday. By Friday I couldn't remember what I had agreed to in any of them. My team was angry. Built this to turn 1 hour of chaos into 30 seconds of clarity.

selected_for_build.name: LinkedIn Bio Writer
selected_for_build.tagline: Turn your job history into a LinkedIn About that gets recruiter DMs
selected_for_build.icp: professionals who know LinkedIn matters but have a blank or weak About section
selected_for_build.pain_point: 85% of professionals have weak LinkedIn About sections — they know it matters but stare at a blank text box every time they try to write it
selected_for_build.core_feature: Enter your role, 3 achievements, target job → AI writes a LinkedIn About section in your voice that ends with a clear CTA and passes the recruiter scroll test
selected_for_build.founder_story: Spent 3 hours trying to write my LinkedIn About. Ended up with: 'Passionate about technology.' A recruiter literally laughed. Built this to stop that from happening to anyone else.

selected_for_build.name: Landing Page Copy AI
selected_for_build.tagline: Complete landing page copy in 2 minutes — headline to FAQ
selected_for_build.icp: indie founders and marketers who need landing page copy but cannot afford a copywriter
selected_for_build.pain_point: Founders spend weeks on product and 10 minutes on copy — then wonder why nobody converts
selected_for_build.core_feature: Enter product name, pain it solves, target customer → AI writes: headline, subheadline, 3 benefit bullets, how-it-works section, objection FAQ, CTA, and pricing copy
selected_for_build.founder_story: My first product had 0 conversions. A copywriter quoted me $3k. I am a developer, not a writer. Learned conversion copywriting the hard way so you do not have to.
